name: Ransomware Incident Response
description: Comprehensive response plan for ransomware incidents targeting critical infrastructure. Covers containment, evidence preservation, eradication, and recovery.

steps.name: Isolate affected systems
steps.description: Immediately segment the affected host from the network. Disable switch ports or VLAN assignments. Do NOT power off — preserve volatile memory.

steps.name: Capture forensic evidence
steps.description: Take memory dumps and disk images of affected systems. Document the ransom note and any IOCs visible on screen.

steps.name: Identify ransomware variant
steps.description: Submit samples to sandbox for analysis. Check ID Ransomware and NoMoreRansom for known decryptors.

steps.name: Assess lateral movement
steps.description: Check for evidence of lateral movement to other hosts. Review authentication logs, SMB traffic, and RDP sessions.

steps.name: Block command and control
steps.description: Block identified C2 IPs and domains at firewall and DNS level. Enable DNS sinkholing for known C2 infrastructure.

steps.name: Restore from backups
steps.description: Verify backup integrity. Restore affected systems from the most recent clean backup. Test restored systems before reconnecting to network.

steps.name: Post-incident hardening
steps.description: Patch the initial access vulnerability. Reset compromised credentials. Update endpoint detection signatures.
